raw_consumer_statement: My citi card was charge {$7.00} by XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX and {$220.00} by XXXX XXXX transfer and {$360.00} by XXXX XXXX XXXX both on XX/XX/XXXX. I was on a Airline flight to XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX. I called the credit card from XXXX on XXXX and disputed the charges. The dispute did not show up on my account so I called again on XX/XX/XXXX and was told I did not dispute the charges so I then disputed the charges again. On XX/XX/XXXX I again called citi card fraud to ask why they had not opened a dispute and the told me again I had to call fraud and dispute the charges. They now show that they will not overturn the charges online and whenever I call I get the runaround from one phone number to another with no resolution. I have had this credit card for 25 years and have never transferred money in any way and these are not my charges.
